label: Supply Chain / Logistics / Procurement

categories.label: Quantified SC Impact
categories.rubric: Score 0-40 on % of bullets with SC metrics (cost savings $, inventory accuracy %, fill rate %, on-time delivery %, KPI improvements, cycle count completion, $PO volume). 'Helped with sourcing' = 0; 'Cut supplier lead time from 14 to 9 days (-36%), issued $420K in POs across 18 SKUs' = strong. Every JD asks for KPIs.

categories.label: Supply Chain Domain Fit
categories.rubric: Score 0-25 on SC/logistics/procurement relevance. Strong: SCM/IE/OR/manufacturing-engineering major, internship at manufacturer/retailer/3PL (P&G, Walmart, Tesla, Caterpillar, Nike, PepsiCo, 3M, UPS/FedEx/Maersk/DHL), co-op in SC, APICS/ASCM student chapter, coursework in SCM/OR/optimization. Weak: unrelated major without bridge coursework.

categories.label: Technical (SC Systems & Analytics)
categories.rubric: Score 0-20 on Excel (pivot tables, VLOOKUP/XLOOKUP, Power Query, VBA macros), ERP/MRP systems (SAP, Oracle, NetSuite, JDE), SQL, Tableau / Power BI dashboards, forecasting/demand planning/S&OP, statistical forecasting. Tier-1 differentiator: SAP/ERP named with hands-on project.

categories.label: Format / ATS
categories.rubric: Score 0-8 on 1-page rule, clean sections, no tables/columns, .docx + .pdf export tested, consistent date formatting. SC recruiters screen hundreds of intern apps — whitespace matters.

categories.label: Brand & Location Flexibility
categories.rubric: Score 0-7 on LinkedIn headline + experience matching resume. SC roles skew 5-day onsite at manufacturing/3PL plants — explicit location/relocation flexibility matters. Bonus: clear US work authorization statement.

categories.label: Extras & Certifications
categories.rubric: Score 0-10 on APICS/ASCM student membership (free, immediate signal), Lean Six Sigma Yellow/Green Belt in progress, CPIM Part 1 / CSCP / CLTD / CPSM coursework, SAP Learning Hub completion, multilingual (Spanish/French/German/Mandarin), sustainability/ESG/circular-SC project, Industry 4.0/digital twin/AI-ML project, capstone or case-competition winner.

skills.name: Microsoft Excel (advanced: pivot tables, VLOOKUP/XLOOKUP, formulas)
Six Sigma (Yellow or Green Belt in progress)

bonus_signals: Supply Chain Management / Industrial Engineering / Operations Research major
Internship at manufacturer (P&G, Unilever, GM, Toyota, Caterpillar, Nike, PepsiCo, 3M)
Internship at 3PL / logistics (UPS, FedEx, Maersk, DHL, Expeditors)
Co-op in supply chain / procurement / planning
APICS/ASCM student chapter membership or officer
Coursework in SCM / IE / OR / optimization / simulation electives
Lean Six Sigma Yellow/Green Belt in progress
CPIM Part 1 / CSCP / CLTD / CPSM coursework
SAP Learning Hub / SAP course completion
Python / R data project on supply chain dataset
Sustainability / ESG / circular supply chain project
FAA Part 107 / ITAR / GMP / HACCP awareness for vertical-specific
